root_cause: GPU 3 experienced uncorrectable ECC double-bit errors after 18 hours of continuous training at 99% utilization. Temperature reached 89°C triggering thermal throttle before ECC failure. GPU required drain, nvidia-smi --gpu-reset, and reboot to clear errors.
contributing_factors: Inadequate cooling — ambient temperature 28°C in rack
No ECC error rate alerting configured
log_snippet: CRITICAL dcgm-exporter GPU 3: UNCORRECTABLE ECC double-bit error detected. row=0x2A1C bank=5 error_type=DRAM_DBE. Signaling CUDA driver: cudaErrorECCUncorrectable
prevention: Add DCGM ECC error rate alert at threshold=1 DBE per hour. Set GPU temperature soft limit to 85°C.

root_cause: Triton inference server received a batch with sequence_length=8192 exceeding the per-request VRAM budget of 40GB on a single A100. CUDA OOM caused pod crash. Root cause was missing max_batch_size validation in the model config.
contributing_factors: No input validation on sequence length
Batch size limit not enforced server-side
log_snippet: ERROR triton-server CUDA out of memory. Tried to allocate 42.00 GiB. GPU 0 has a total capacity of 79.20 GiB of which 38.50 GiB is free. RuntimeError: CUDA out of memory
prevention: Add server-side sequence length validation. Set Triton max_batch_size=4 and max_sequence_length=4096 in model config.

root_cause: NVLink link 2 between GPU 1 and GPU 2 accumulated 47 replay errors over 6 hours, reducing tensor parallel bandwidth by 40%. Driver state corruption from a previous ungraceful shutdown caused persistent error accumulation.
contributing_factors: Previous ungraceful node shutdown left NVLink in bad state
Tensor parallel job did not detect degraded bandwidth
log_snippet: WARNING dcgm-exporter GPU 1: NVLink error detected. link_id=2, error_type=replay_error, count=47 (cumulative). Bandwidth reduced 40%.
prevention: Alert on NVLink replay_error count > 10 per hour. Add graceful shutdown hook to fabricmanager service.

root_cause: GPU 2 thermal shutdown triggered at 96°C after fan controller firmware bug caused Fan 2 to stop at 45% speed despite 95°C+ temperatures. The GPU automatically clocked down but could not prevent shutdown. Fan firmware update required.
contributing_factors: Fan controller firmware bug (version 3.1.2) causing incorrect PWM output
log_snippet: CRITICAL dcgm-exporter GPU 2: Thermal shutdown event! gpu_temp=96C > shutdown_threshold=95C. Fan speed=45% (expected 100%). Possible fan hardware failure.
prevention: Monitor fan_speed_percent < 60% when temp > 80°C as an independent alert. Schedule quarterly fan firmware updates.

root_cause: vLLM process memory leak in KV cache management accumulated 76GB over 4 hours of serving, eventually exhausting GPU memory. The KV cache eviction policy was not reclaiming completed sequences correctly due to a bug in vLLM v0.2.7.
contributing_factors: vLLM v0.2.7 KV cache eviction bug
No GPU memory usage trending alert
Single long-running pod without periodic restart
log_snippet: ERROR vllm-inference GPU memory usage: 76.8GB/80GB (96%). KV cache eviction failed: no sequences eligible for eviction. RuntimeError: CUDA out of memory during attention computation.
remediation_steps: kubectl set image deployment/vllm-inference vllm-server=vllm/vllm-openai:v0.3.1 -n ml-serving
prevention: Upgrade to vLLM >= v0.3.0. Add GPU memory > 90% alert with 5-minute sustained window. Configure pod restart policy on memory threshold.

root_cause: PCIe bus errors on GPU 1 caused by a loose PCIe x16 connector following a server maintenance operation. GPU enumeration succeeded but data transfers were corrupted, causing intermittent CUDA errors across multiple training jobs.
contributing_factors: Physical PCIe connector loosened during RAM upgrade maintenance
log_snippet: ERROR xid-gpu-1 XID 79 (GPU has fallen off the bus). PCIe AER: corrected error count=847 in last 10 minutes. NCCL error: unhandled system error (Network timeout or element not found).
remediation_steps: Power on and run nvidia-smi to verify enumeration
prevention: Add PCIe AER corrected error rate alert. Implement post-maintenance checklist requiring GPU diagnostic run.
